ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Total land area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_url" TEXT /* Official URL of the state's government website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health indicator record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state this record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "poverty" REAL /* Percentage of population living in poverty */,
  "poverty_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for poverty percentage */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age of the population */,
  "age_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for age */,
  "income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "income_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for income */,
  "healthcare_access" REAL /* Percentage of population with healthcare access */,
  "healthcare_low" REAL /* Lower bound for healthcare access */,
  "healthcare_high" REAL /* Upper bound for healthcare access */,
  "obesity" REAL /* Obesity percentage in the population */,
  "obesity_low" REAL /* Lower bound for obesity percentage */,
  "obesity_high" REAL /* Upper bound for obesity percentage */,
  "smokes" REAL /* Percentage of smokers in the population */,
  "smokes_low" REAL /* Lower bound for smoking percentage */,
  "smokes_high" REAL /* Upper bound for smoking percentage */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the state */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Rate of infant mortality per 1,000 live births */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public health official) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of what data is provided by the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* Official URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "fulfilled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who fulfilled the request */,
  "fulfilled_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was fulfilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_fulfilled_by FOREIGN KEY ("fulfilled_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report, praise) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, reviewed, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, custom) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "accessed_feature" TEXT /* Feature accessed (e.g., health indicators, reports) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the population record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state this record belongs to */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_population_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state this record belongs to */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the visualization represents */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph, map) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
